SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SUNNY HWANG. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PAUL MCALEESE ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF AND KELL'S OF SAN FRANCISCO, INCORPORATED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HWANG, SUNNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INCORPORATED MCALEESE, PAUL O. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $270.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,270.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KELLS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INCORPORATED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
